admissibility_variants.name: Pure scalar-gradient admissibility
admissibility_variants.purpose: Baseline: select associations by least scalar-gradient burden only.

admissibility_variants.name: Split-conjugacy preserving admissibility
admissibility_variants.purpose: Test whether generated +/- split relations are preserved as relation records after lift/SOO.

admissibility_variants.name: Relation-complete burden admissibility
admissibility_variants.purpose: Minimize burden of the relation, including cancellation and non-path balance, without predeclaring photon form.

admissibility_variants.name: Successor-covariant cyclic admissibility
admissibility_variants.purpose: Read candidate records across ordered scalar-field phases instead of loading three local components.

admissibility_variants.name: Bounded-support closure admissibility
admissibility_variants.purpose: Permit post-run separation of triangle-only scaffolds, triangle+shell, bounded-support candidates, transverse records, and unclassified carriers.

corrected_modeling_question: Can split/lifted vacuum plus SOO plus admissible association generate a relation-complete record with path-facing residual zero and non-path q/-q?

required_controls.purpose: Attempt to make Delta L=0 by sealing component 0 as an all-zero subsystem.

required_controls.expected_exploratory_behavior: Rejected as provenance mismatch; photon-like records must be post-run readouts.
required_controls.purpose: Attempt to install [0,q,-q] locally before SOO.

required_controls.expected_exploratory_behavior: Rejected; v0.1.42 uses one vacuum provenance for all candidates.
required_controls.purpose: Attempt to compare prebuilt triangle/photon/bounded endpoint classes.
Attempt to hand the runner triangle membership.
Attempt to hand the runner a bounded support endpoint.

required_controls.expected_exploratory_behavior: Quarantined as interface interpretation, not generator input.
required_controls.purpose: Attempt to label generated records as Standard Model particles before closure provenance is known.

required_controls.expected_exploratory_behavior: Rejected; Delta L is read after center-condition audit.
required_controls.purpose: Attempt to supply expected path accommodation.

required_controls.expected_exploratory_behavior: Allowed negative result; absence of q/-q is not failure of the runner.
required_controls.purpose: Run pure-gradient admissibility and ask whether relation-complete q/-q appears without additional admissibility.

required_controls.expected_exploratory_behavior: Passed only if generated phase readouts, not preloaded transverse metadata, feed the certifier.
required_controls.purpose: Run relation-complete burden without q/-q initialization.

required_controls.expected_exploratory_behavior: Classified as scaffold/carrier-level only; Standard Model comparison quarantined.
required_controls.purpose: Triangle path accommodation appears without bounded-support closure.

starting_condition: undefined vacuum with one or more split/lift events; no endpoint classes supplied
